required_preferences.fact: Uses new inventory software to track refrigerated stock and completes digital inventory checks before closing — only verifies unusual discrepancies by hand

supersedes.fact: Takes inventory by hand every evening before closing — never relies solely on digital records

required_preferences.fact: Negotiates staple grocery deals with suppliers exclusively by phone or email — no longer meets vendors in person before store hours

supersedes.fact: Meets suppliers at the store early in the morning — never negotiates deals by phone or email

required_preferences.fact: Cooks low-sodium meals for dinner every night — avoids processed foods to manage blood pressure
Requires a midday break to rest and check symptoms during long shifts — no longer works through without a rest, regardless of store busyness
Keeps detailed digital records of all supplier negotiations, storing price lists and terms in a dedicated folder for future reference
Shops at independent grocers and markets on his rare days off — never at big chain supermarkets

persona: An immigrant small business owner managing finances for a family-run grocery store
